data.title: 国际服未花角色曲「Aria to the Star」发布&圣诞礼物
data.summary: Sensei, Merry Christmas! 🎄 Mika’s mini musical, “Aria to the Star,” is now live on our official YouT
data.body:
Sensei, Merry Christmas! 🎄
Mika’s mini musical, “Aria to the Star,” is now live on our official YouTube channel! 💫

Alongside the musical release, Mika has prepared a warm Christmas gift just for you.
Don’t forget to redeem the special coupon code during the event period to receive Pyroxenes~

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3303925

#BlueArchive![G82gGkHbQAAWspp.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/ET4RzrFePYa3kpJE0woh48DFLFPitm04.jpg)
